options.description: Explicitly tell the CLI to bootstrap the app using npm
Explicitly tell the CLI to bootstrap the app using pnpm
An example to bootstrap the app with. You can use an example name from the official Next.js repo or a GitHub URL. The URL can use any branch and/or subdirectory

In a rare case, your GitHub URL might contain a branch name with a slash (e.g. bug/fix-1) and the path to the example (e.g. foo/bar). In this case, you must specify the path to the example separately:
